violations.text: An accumulation of ice was observed in the walk-in freezer. Walk-in freezer to be serviced to ensure that ice build up does not occur. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

An accumulation of ice was observed in the walk-in freezer. Door was observed to not fully shut. Walk-in freezer to be serviced to ensure that ice build up does not occur. New Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. PIC contacted maintenance at the time of inspection. Maintenance can not service unit until tomorrow. Establishment to sanitize all equipment/utensils/dishes etc. in the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice from the vent. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator of inspectors and establishments test strip) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. All dishes to be sanitized in 3-bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

At the time of inspection, recently prepped wraps in the "Fast Takes" sliding door cooler were observed held at 47 to 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Food Prep Procedures to include a re-cooling process for the recently prepared wraps prior to being placed in clamshell containers. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
